_help.load_ratio: Grid Load Ratio. abs(unrealized_pnl_usdt) / gross_profit_usdt. Shows how much floating risk is taken per 1 USDT of closed profit.
_help.recovery_factor: Recovery Factor. gross_profit_usdt / abs(max_drawdown_usdt). Shows if the bots profit can cover historical max drawdowns.
_help.gross_profit_usdt: Total realized profit including commissions and funding fees from all closed trades.
_help.net_profit_usdt: gross_profit_usdt + unrealized_pnl_usdt. The true mathematical growth of the account.
_help.unrealized_pnl_usdt: Current floating drawdown (unrealized PnL) of all open positions.
_help.performance_usdt: Maximum historical growth from start balance (peak - start_balance).
_help.avg_daily_profit: [Per-Coin] Average profit per active day of trading for this coin.
_help.max_position_size: [Per-Coin] Max historical margin size actually reached (real deployed margin).
_help.DRME: [Per-Coin] Daily Return on Max Exposure: avg_daily_profit / max_position_size.
_help.MDME: [Per-Coin] Max Drawdown on Max Exposure: abs(max_drawdown) / max_position_size.
_help.max_net_profit: [Per-Coin] Historical maximum of the coin's fixed net profit.
_help.min_net_profit: [Per-Coin] Historical minimum of the coin's fixed net profit.
_help.max_drawdown: [Per-Coin] Historical maximum floating drawdown for this coin.
_help.min_drawdown: [Per-Coin] Historical minimum floating drawdown for this coin.
